data.content: Shipment review approved. Verified: (1) commits 149a398c1a49 and 6e921ed4a276 live on main, (2) both commit tags present, (3) CI+Coverage Badge green on merge commit, (4) all 2156 tests pass, no type errors, no new lint errors in changed files. Implementation adds Detail toggle (default off) to interaction-picker and terminal-panel, with stateful line filter for terminal output. Code is clean and matches plan.
